policy: Community reports select candidates and seed recipes. Promotion conclusions come ONLY from local measurements on this host.

entries.community_source: internal MODEL-LANDSCAPE research notes (Nemotron 3 family shortlist; NVIDIA RTX-PC positioning)
entries.hardware_relevance: NVFP4 Blackwell-native; ~30B MoE A3B fits RTX 5090 32GB
entries.engine_relevance: vLLM; nemotron_h hybrid Mamba-Transformer arch, custom_code
entries.influenced: candidate selection (fast-tier text role) + quantization choice (NVFP4 per repo gotcha #17)

entries.engine_relevance: any-to-any multimodal arch NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3; vLLM support to be verified locally

entries.community_source: internal MODEL-LANDSCAPE research notes (Gemma 4 as Ornith base; general-assistant role)
entries.hardware_relevance: 31B dense QAT W4A16 (~19GB weights) fits RTX 5090 32GB
entries.engine_relevance: vLLM compressed-tensors; OMIT --quantization per repo gotcha #18
entries.influenced: candidate selection (fast/general tier) + quantization choice (official QAT over community GGUF)

entries.community_source: internal MODEL-LANDSCAPE research notes: 'SOTA open @ size (TB-2.1, SWE-Bench, OpenClaw), agentic-coding-native' — vendor-reported scores flagged as unverified
entries.hardware_relevance: 35B MoE FP8 (~36GB weights) requires RTX PRO 6000 96GB
entries.engine_relevance: qwen3_5_moe arch (Gated-DeltaNet hybrid risk on sm_120 per repo gotcha #16); compressed-tensors FP8 — omit --quantization
entries.influenced: candidate selection (agent/coding role). Vendor benchmark claims used ONLY for selection, never as measured results.

entries.community_source: community REAP expert-pruning release (arXiv:2510.13999 method); NOT an official MiniMax checkpoint
entries.hardware_relevance: 139B-A10B REAP NVFP4 (~70GB weights) targets RTX PRO 6000 96GB
entries.engine_relevance: minimax_m2 arch, custom_code, compressed-tensors NVFP4 tagged vllm/blackwell
entries.influenced: candidate selection (heavy tier). Community checkpoint quality unverified; local gates decide.

entries.hardware_relevance: 158B MoE; native FP8 (~158GB) does NOT fit 96GB. NVFP4 (~83GB weights) is a borderline fit attempt on RTX PRO 6000
entries.engine_relevance: deepseek_v4 arch; ModelOpt NVFP4 takes --quantization modelopt_fp4 per repo gotcha #10
entries.influenced: candidate selection (heavy tier stretch). Expected tight fit; failure to fit is itself a recorded result.

entries.hardware_relevance: current production heavy tier on RTX PRO 6000
current production fast tier on RTX 5090

entries.community_source: local-inference-lab/rtx6kpro wiki + 0xsero/blackwell-gpu-wiki (repo gotcha #19: sm_120 prior art)
entries.hardware_relevance: sm_120 kernel-maturity guidance (MoE-NVFP4 grouped-GEMM caveats, gotcha #16)
entries.influenced: engine image choice (nvcr.io/nvidia/vllm:26.04-py3, proven by the 2026-07-10 qwen35-122b heavy candidate run) and expectation-setting for hybrid-attention candidates
